message:
refactor(theme): implement signature-based color harmonization system

Major theme system refactoring introducing ThemeSignature for per-theme
color parameterization:

- New color utilities: clamp_u8, mix_rgb (linear interpolation),
  boost_vibrance (saturation enhancement), apply_temperature (warm/cool
  color shifts)
- ThemeSignature struct with background layer mixing percentages,
  contrast targets for text hierarchy, vibrance boost/ambient glow
  amounts, and temperature shift parameters
- Per-theme signature customization via signature_for_theme() with
  sensible light/dark defaults
- stylize_accent() replaces direct ensure_min_contrast() calls for
  accent colors, applying vibrance, temperature, and contrast transforms
- All background colors now use parameterized mixing via signature with
  ambient glow tinting
- Enhanced accent-pair distance checking with vibrance-adjusted thresholds
- New vibrant/soft color slot variants and crystal_mix/rich_warning
  accent derivations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
